questionHtml:
Two containers X and Y are maintained at the same temperature. X has volume 4 m3 and Y has volume 6 m3. They both hold an ideal gas. The pressure in X is 100 Pa and the pressure in Y is 50 Pa. The containers are then joined by a tube of negligible volume. What is the final pressure in the containers?

A.  70 Pa

B.  75 Pa

C.  80 Pa

D.  150 Pa
